question: What are your hours?
answer: We're open Business Hours Monday 7:30 AM  - 4:30 PM Tuesday 7:30 AM  - 4:30 PM Wednesday 7:30 AM  - 4:30 PM Thu. Call us at 603-742-4735 if you need to confirm availability.

question: How do I book an appointment?
answer: You can book online at belknapdental.com or call us at 603-742-4735. We'll find a time that works for you!

question: Do you accept my insurance?
answer: We accept a wide range of dental insurance for general dentistry, including: AlwaysCare/UNUM, Assurant/Sunlife, Bento, BCBS Federal, Anthem/BCBS (Grid+ and Complete), CIGNA (Total and Connection Dental), Delta Premier, GEHA, Guardian, Martin's Point NE Delta, MetLife PPO, Principal PPO, Sunlife, UNUM, and United Concordia private employer plans. Not sure if yours is covered? Call us at 603-742-4735 and we'll verify your benefits for free.

question: What services do you offer?
answer: At Belknap Dental Associates, we offer General Dentistry, Cosmetic Dentistry, Teeth Whitening, Dental Implants, Orthodontics, Root Canal, Crowns, Dentures. We're here for all your dental needs!

question: Are you accepting new patients?
answer: Yes! Belknap Dental Associates is always welcoming new patients. Call 603-742-4735 to get started — we'll make your first visit easy and comfortable.

question: What should I expect at my first visit?
answer: Your first visit includes a comprehensive exam, X-rays, and a cleaning. We'll discuss your dental health and create a personalized treatment plan. Plan for about 60-90 minutes.

question: Do you handle dental emergencies?
answer: Yes, we handle dental emergencies! If you're in pain or had an accident, call 603-742-4735 immediately. We'll get you in as soon as possible.

question: How much does a cleaning cost?
answer: Cleaning costs vary based on your insurance coverage. Most plans cover preventive cleanings at 100%. Call 603-742-4735 for a cost estimate with your specific insurance.

question: Do you offer teeth whitening?
answer: Yes! We offer professional teeth whitening that delivers dramatic results safely. Ask about our options at your next visit or call 603-742-4735 to learn more.

question: Do you see children?
answer: Absolutely! We love treating kids at Belknap Dental Associates. We recommend bringing children in for their first visit by age 1 or when their first tooth appears.

question: What payment options do you have?
answer: We accept CareCredit for financing larger treatments, plus cash and credit cards. If you're out-of-network, we'll submit insurance claims on your behalf. Call 603-742-4735 to discuss payment options.

question: Where are you located?
answer: We're located at 40 Chestnut St #2, Dover, NH 03820. Easy parking available. Call us at 603-742-4735.

question: Do you offer Invisalign?
answer: Yes! We're proud to offer Invisalign clear aligners at Belknap Dental Associates. Schedule a consultation to see if Invisalign is right for you.

question: Who are your dentists?
answer:
We have 4 doctors on our team:

- Dr. Rayanne E. Lee, DMD — Orthodontist (Harvard-trained)
- Dr. Jefferson Kim, DMD — General Dentist, Invisalign Provider
- Dr. Peter Wilson, DMD — General Dentist, Invisalign
- Dr. Jordan Betel, DMD — General Dentist, Laser Dentistry & Same-Day Crowns

Call 603-742-4735 to schedule with any of our doctors.

question: Who are your doctors?
answer:
We have 4 doctors on our team:

- Dr. Rayanne E. Lee, DMD — Orthodontist (Harvard-trained)
- Dr. Jefferson Kim, DMD — General Dentist, Invisalign Provider
- Dr. Peter Wilson, DMD — General Dentist, Invisalign
- Dr. Jordan Betel, DMD — General Dentist, Laser Dentistry & Same-Day Crowns

Call 603-742-4735 to schedule with any of our doctors.

question: Tell me about Dr. Lee
answer: Dr. Rayanne E. Lee, DMD is our board-certified orthodontist. She trained at Harvard and specializes in orthodontic care for patients of all ages — from children to adults. Whether you need braces or aligners, Dr. Lee has you covered.

question: Tell me about Dr. Kim
answer: Our lead dentist is Dr. Jefferson Kim, DMD — a General Dentist and certified Invisalign provider at Belknap Dental Associates. He values the art of dentistry and is known for building trust with every patient. Dr. Kim focuses on personalized care and making sure you feel comfortable from your very first visit.

question: Tell me about Dr. Wilson
answer: Dr. Peter Wilson, DMD is a general dentist at Belknap Dental Associates with a focus on Invisalign. He graduated from Boston University and is known for his gentle, compassionate approach. Dr. Wilson makes every patient feel at ease, even if you're nervous about the dentist.

question: Tell me about Dr. Betel
answer: Dr. Jordan Betel, DMD is a general dentist at Belknap Dental Associates who specializes in laser dentistry and same-day crowns. He graduated from Nova Southeastern University and loves using the latest technology to make your visit faster and more comfortable.

question: Do you have an orthodontist?
answer: Yes! Dr. Rayanne E. Lee is our board-certified orthodontist. She trained at Harvard and provides orthodontic care for all ages, including braces and clear aligners. Call us to schedule an orthodontic consultation.

question: Do you offer sedation dentistry?
answer: Yes, we offer sedation options for patients who feel anxious about dental visits. We want every visit to be comfortable and stress-free.

question: What about dental implants?
answer: We offer dental implants as a permanent solution for missing teeth. Call 603-742-4735 to schedule a consultation and learn if implants are right for you.

question: Do you take walk-ins?
answer: We prefer appointments so we can give you dedicated time, but we do our best to accommodate walk-ins and emergencies. Call 603-742-4735 to check availability.

question: Can I see you on weekends?
answer: Please call us at 603-742-4735 to check our weekend availability. We understand busy schedules and try to offer convenient appointment times.

question: Do you do root canals?
answer: Yes, we perform root canal therapy at Belknap Dental Associates. It's a routine procedure and we ensure your comfort throughout. Don't worry — modern root canals are much easier than you might think!

question: What COVID precautions do you take?
answer: Patient safety is our top priority. We follow all CDC and ADA guidelines including enhanced sanitization, air filtration, and screening protocols.

question: What insurance do you accept for orthodontics?
answer: For orthodontic treatment, we accept Assurant, Anthem Private Employer, Delta PPO and Premier, Guardian, MetLife, Principal, and United Concordia Private Employer plans. Call 603-742-4735 to verify your orthodontic coverage.

question: Do you have a membership plan?
answer:
Yes! For patients without insurance, we offer our in-house Illumitrac membership plan with a $55 lifetime activation fee:

- Child (12 and under): $34/month
- Adult: $42/month
- Adult PerioCare: $59/month

Includes cleanings, exams, x-rays, and 15% off all other treatments. Call 603-742-4735 to sign up.

question: Do you accept CareCredit?
answer: Yes! We accept CareCredit for financing dental treatments. We also take cash and credit cards. Call 603-742-4735 to discuss payment options.

question: What if my insurance is out-of-network?
answer: No problem! If you're out-of-network, we'll submit insurance claims on your behalf so you can still get reimbursed. Call 603-742-4735 and we'll help you understand your coverage.

question: How do I book online?
answer: You can book online at belknapdental.com or call us at 603-742-4735. We'll find a time that works for you!
